description_for_human: Query the Lunara Trust Registry to verify businesses, check Shield status, and get structured contact routes for entities in the autonomous economy.
description_for_model: Use this to verify business entities against Lunara's live, human-reviewed registry. Live JSON endpoints: shieldRegistryLookup (check one domain/public_id) and shieldRegistryList (list all currently approved entities) at https://superagent-d6d4ecd1.base44.app/functions/. Status reflects real review outcomes — not_registered means the business has not completed verification, not that it is untrustworthy.
